title: Cleaner Tooltips
description: A simple client-side mod that changes the tooltips of tools and armor to display their attributes as icons.
body:
![Cleaner Tooltips](https://i.imgur.com/LKzHZmj.png)

**Cleaner Tooltips** is a simple mod that replaces how attributes are displayed with clean and intuitive icons.

This mod is fully client-sided.

![Example Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3284d7ed59a5e8f7c0c14de0761ea543be91c6c.png)

## Features

- Display the durability of items
- Compare the attributes of equipped and hovered over items
- Sharpness increases the attack damage (Fixes [MC-271840](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-271840))
- Display the mining speed of tools (disabled by default)
- The textures and rendering/calculation logic is fully resource pack driven

## Compatibility
Cleaner Tooltips should be compatible with most mods affecting the UI, but some mods have explicit compatibility:

- [BetterCombat](https://modrinth.com/project/5sy6g3kz): The attack range is displayed as the entity reach attribute
- [Equipment Compare](https://modrinth.com/project/CYSUVOdj) & [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/project/atHH8NyV): correctly displays the icons below the horizontal divisor
